home.title: My Plants
home.emptyBody: Add your first plant. I’ll help identify it, understand how it’s doing, and remind you when it needs care.
settings.title: Settings
homeContext.settingsDescription: Add homes and rooms so care advice can use real light, humidity, and location context.
homeContext.setupBody: Set up rooms so AI can use real light, humidity, and home conditions in care advice.
homeContext.finishSetupBody: I found {plantCount} plants in {roomCount} rooms. Add them to your home so AI can use real light and room conditions.
homeContext.directSunHelper: Choose when direct rays usually reach this room.
homeContext.legacyRoomNote: This plant still uses an older room label. Select a home and room when you are ready.
homeContext.importTitle: We found your plants and rooms
homeContext.importDescription: We’ll add existing plants to this home and keep their current arrangement.
homeContext.importFailed: I couldn’t move the plants. Please try again.
homeContext.plantsWithoutRoom: {count} plants without a room will be added to this home.
homeContext.unassignedPlants: {count} plants are not assigned to a home yet.
homeContext.locationDetected: Location found. You can edit it before saving.
homeContext.locationUnavailable: I couldn’t detect the location. Search for your city instead.
homeContext.noHomeChanges: Make a change to save this home.
homeContext.homeSaveFailed: I couldn’t save this home. Please try again.
homeContext.noRoomChanges: Make a change to save this room.
homeContext.roomSaveFailed: I couldn’t save this room. Please try again.
pwa.updateReady: A new version is ready. Refresh to update.
auth.title: Sign in to my plants
auth.description: Enter your email — we’ll send a secure sign-in link.
auth.magicLinkSent: Link sent. Check your email and open the message on this device.
auth.magicLinkError: I couldn’t send the link. Please try again.
auth.passwordSignInError: I couldn’t sign you in. Please try again.
auth.invalidEmail: Check the email address and try again.
auth.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
auth.rateLimit: Too many email requests. Wait a little and try again, or sign in with your password.
auth.callbackText: One moment while I connect your plant collection.
auth.callbackError: Please request a new link and try again.
auth.reauthenticate: Your session expired. Please sign in again; your selected photos will stay here.
auth.passwordUpdateFailed: I couldn’t update the password. Please sign in again and try once more.
notifications.title: Care reminders
notifications.description: I’ll remind you when a plant is due for a soil check or follow-up care.
notifications.unsupported: Push notifications are not available in this browser. On iPhone, they work only in the installed PWA.
notifications.failedMessage: I couldn’t update notifications. Please try again.
notifications.requiresInstallTitle: Add the app to your Home Screen first.
notifications.requiresInstallBody: On iPhone, reminders work only in the installed app. Open it from the Home Screen and turn notifications on there.
notifications.deniedMessage: Notification access is turned off for this app.
notifications.deniedAction: Open iOS settings for My Plants AI and allow notifications.
notifications.error.openInstalled: Open the installed Home Screen app.
notifications.error.unsupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
notifications.error.serviceWorker: The service worker failed to start.
notifications.error.testFailed: I couldn’t send the test notification.
addPlant.title: Add a plant
addPlant.message: The full add-plant flow will live here soon.
addPlant.analysisLong: This may take a little time — photos are prepared on this device first.
addPlant.analysisLongCalm: Analysis is taking longer than usual. You can leave the screen open, or cancel and try again later.
addPlant.restorePhotosMissing: The previous add-plant session could not be restored safely. Please select the photos again.
addPlant.analysisFailed: I couldn’t analyze this plant right now. You can still add it manually.
addPlant.technicalFailureText: This looks like a technical processing or request issue, not a low-confidence plant identification.
addPlant.noPhotosSelectedText: Add at least one photo to start analysis.
addPlant.photoLimitReached: You can add up to 3 photos for the first analysis. More photos can be added after the plant is created.
addPlant.initialPhotoLimitMessage: You can add up to 3 photos for the first analysis. More photos can be added after the plant is created.
addPlant.discardPhotosConfirm: Discard the selected photos and cancel adding this plant?
addPlant.cancelAddBody: Selected photos and the analysis result will be deleted.
addPlant.manualEmptyConfirm: Save this plant without a plant name? You can fix it later in the plant card.
addPlant.manualNameRequired: Add a plant name or confirm manual saving without identification.
addPlant.lowConfidenceTitle: I couldn’t identify the species confidently.
addPlant.lowConfidenceText: Review the plant name or edit it manually before adding.
addPlant.submitFailed: I couldn’t add this plant right now. Please try again.
addPlant.temporaryPhotosExpired: These temporary photos are from an older app version. Please select them again.
addPlant.nicknameEmptyPrompt: Leave the nickname empty? I can make a new cute one.
addPlant.generateNicknameConfirm: Make a new home nickname for this plant?
addPlant.nicknameEmpty: The home nickname is empty. Save your own name or confirm a new random one.
addPlant.conditionHealthyText: Detailed recommendations will appear on the plant detail page.
addPlant.conditionCheckText: After adding, we’ll show what needs attention.
addPlant.conditionHighText: A detailed care plan will be on the plant detail page.
plantDetail.title: Plant details
plantDetail.placeholder: The complete plant detail screen will be added later.
plantDetail.editPlaceholder: Plant editing will be added later.
plantDetail.deleteBody: Its photos and care history will also be deleted.
baseline.title: Care baseline
baseline.helper: This helps me set reminders and future recommendations.
baseline.wateringHelper: To take better care of this plant, I’d like to learn a little about its routine.
baseline.repottingHelper: This helps me avoid recommending a stressful repot too soon.
checkSoil.title: How does the soil feel?
checkSoil.wait: No watering yet. We’ll choose the next check based on this plant.
checkSoil.wet: The soil is still very wet. Avoid watering for now.
checkSoil.wetWarning: If it stays wet for a long time, check drainage and airflow.
checkSoil.unsure: Try checking the top 3–4 cm of soil with your finger.
checkSoil.saveFailed: Couldn’t save the soil check. Please try again.
photo.title: Add a new photo
photo.message: Photo analysis will be added later.
photos.title: Photos
photos.coverHelper: This photo is shown on the Home screen.
photos.removeLastConfirm: Remove the last photo? Analysis will be unavailable until you add a new photo.
photos.analyzeIssue: Would you like me to analyse this issue?
photos.fileError:
This image could not be added.
Please choose a JPG, PNG, HEIC or WebP image under 10 MB.
photos.partialAdded: {added} photos added. {rejected} file could not be used.
photos.deleteBody: It will be removed from this plant.
photos.onlyPhotoError: A plant must have at least one photo.
plantAnalysis.title: AI recommendations
plantAnalysis.staleBody: You can refine the advice so it fits this plant better now.
plantAnalysis.updateSuccess: The advice is more precise now.
plantAnalysis.alreadyCurrent: The advice already fits the current conditions.
plantAnalysis.updateFailed: I couldn’t update recommendations. Please try again.
plantAnalysis.refreshFailedInline: Couldn’t update the advice. Your care information was saved.
plantAnalysis.staleReason.no_revision: The advice has not been refined since the latest changes.
plantAnalysis.staleReason.prompt_updated: Recommendations were generated with an older AI prompt.
plantAnalysis.staleReason.model_updated: Recommendations were generated with an older AI model.
plantAnalysis.visualEvidenceOldBody: The last visual check is {days} days old. Recommendations still use your current care context, but new photos would help check the plant’s condition.
plantAnalysis.statusLooksOkay: The plant looks healthy. No urgent issues are visible.
plantAnalysis.statusRecovering: The plant appears to be adapting after its recent care.
plantAnalysis.statusOldDamage: There are a few older marks, but they do not look like an urgent problem.
plantAnalysis.statusStableWatch: The plant looks stable, with one detail worth watching.
plantAnalysis.statusDetailRepot: The recent repot is already accounted for and does not need repeating.
plantAnalysis.statusDetailSun: Some marks may be from earlier direct sun.
plantAnalysis.statusDetailNoUrgent: There is nothing that needs immediate attention.
plantAnalysis.causeSunStress: This looks most consistent with direct sun stress.
plantAnalysis.causeRepotAdaptation: After a recent repot, the plant may be temporarily adapting.
plantAnalysis.causeWatering: Watering balance may be involved, so the soil should guide the next step.
plantAnalysis.causePests: Pests could explain some damage if they are actually found.
plantAnalysis.causeRoots: Root condition can affect recovery after repotting.
plantAnalysis.causeOldSoil: Old or compacted soil is only likely if the plant has not been repotted recently.
plantAnalysis.causeDrainage: Poor drainage can keep soil from drying evenly.
plantAnalysis.observationPortulacariaNor: Small rounded leaves are normal for Portulacaria
plantAnalysis.evidencePhotoLight: Photos and history point to light stress
plantAnalysis.checkedRootsNormal: During repotting, the roots looked light and firm.
plantAnalysis.checkedRootsProblem: During repotting, some roots looked dark or soft.
plantAnalysis.checkedRepotRecently: User confirmed the plant was repotted recently.
plantAnalysis.checkedRepotLongAgo: User confirmed the plant has not been repotted for a while.
plantAnalysis.checkedRepotUnsure: User is not sure when the plant was repotted.
plantAnalysis.checkedDirectSun: The plant recently stood in direct sun.
plantAnalysis.checkedSomeDirectSun: The plant gets direct sun sometimes.
plantAnalysis.checkedNoDirectSun: Direct sun has been ruled out.
plantAnalysis.checkedSunUnsure: User is not sure about direct sun.
plantAnalysis.checkedSoilVeryWet: The soil is currently very wet.
plantAnalysis.checkedSoilUnsure: User is not sure what the soil feels like.
plantAnalysis.checkedDrainageNo: The pot does not have drainage holes.
plantAnalysis.checkedDrainageUnsure: User is not sure about drainage holes.
plantAnalysis.meaningRepotAccounted: The repot is already accounted for: do not repot again now.
plantAnalysis.meaningPestsRuledOut: Active pests are now unlikely, so the advice can focus on light, watering, and recovery.
plantAnalysis.meaningRootsNormal: Based on your answer, roots are not an active concern.
plantAnalysis.meaningSunRuledOut: Direct sun is now less likely, so I will not treat it as the main explanation.
plantAnalysis.conclusionPestsFound: Pest care should be prioritized before routine care.
plantAnalysis.conclusionPestsUnsure: Pests are still uncertain, so inspect new damage before treating.
plantAnalysis.conclusionSoilDry: Dry soil may mean watering is due, depending on this plant’s normal drying rhythm.
plantAnalysis.conclusionSoilWet: Hold off on watering and watch drainage/airflow.
plantAnalysis.conclusionSoilUnsure: Use a quick finger check before deciding about water.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRecentRepot: Some older damage may be transplant stress, so avoid another repot now.
plantAnalysis.conclusionOldRepot: Soil age may still matter if symptoms continue.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRepotUnsure: Repot timing is uncertain, so I will avoid strong soil-age claims.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRepottedDate: Recent repotting is already part of the care plan.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRootsNormal: Root problems are less likely after your repotting check.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRootsConcern: Root recovery needs careful watering and observation.
plantAnalysis.conclusionRootsUnsure: Roots remain uncertain, but there is no reason to disturb them unless symptoms worsen.
plantAnalysis.conclusionDirectSun: Light stress is more likely, so bright indirect light is safer now.
plantAnalysis.conclusionNoDirectSun: Direct sun is less likely to be the main cause.
plantAnalysis.conclusionSunUnsure: Light remains uncertain, so watch whether new growth improves in softer light.
plantAnalysis.conclusionDrainageYes: Drainage is less likely to be the main issue.
plantAnalysis.conclusionDrainageNo: Poor drainage can keep roots too wet, so watering should stay conservative.
plantAnalysis.conclusionDrainageUnsure: Drainage is still worth checking before heavy watering.
plantAnalysis.actionBrightIndirect: Keep it in bright indirect light.
plantAnalysis.actionDoNotRepot: Do not repot again right now: after a recent repot, the plant needs time to adapt.
plantAnalysis.actionPests: Isolate the plant and inspect the affected areas closely.
plantAnalysis.actionRoots: If roots were dark or soft, water carefully and watch the newest growth.
plantAnalysis.actionWatchNewGrowth: Watch the newest growth: a good sign is fresh tissue forming without new marks or soft spots.
plantAnalysis.actionNothingNow: Nothing needs to be done right now.
plantAnalysis.questionSun: Is this plant currently in direct sun?
plantAnalysis.questionSoil: What does the soil feel like right now?
plantAnalysis.questionRoots: When you repotted the plant, did the roots look normal?
plantAnalysis.questionDrainage: Does the pot have drainage holes?
plantAnalysis.questionReasonPests: This changes whether treatment is needed or whether we can focus on recovery.
plantAnalysis.questionReasonSun: Light history can explain old dry marks without adding unnecessary treatments.
plantAnalysis.questionReasonSoil: This decides whether watering helps today or would make things worse.
plantAnalysis.questionReasonRoots: A recent repot is useful context only if the roots looked unhealthy.
plantAnalysis.questionReasonRepot: Repot timing changes whether soil stress is likely.
plantAnalysis.questionReasonDrainage: Drainage changes how cautious the watering advice should be.
plantAnalysis.answerRootsProblem: Some areas were dark or soft
plantAnalysis.answerSaveFailed: I couldn’t save that answer. Please try again.
photoAssessment.title: New photos
photoAssessment.reviewed: I reviewed the new photos. The care picture is clearer now.
photoAssessment.stable: I reviewed the new photos. The plant looks stable.
photoAssessment.newSigns: I found new signs, so the care plan should adjust.
photoAssessment.failed: The photos were saved, but I couldn’t update the assessment.
edit.title: Edit plant
edit.noChanges: Make a change to save this plant.
edit.saveFailed: I couldn’t save the plant. Please try again.
story.noFutureDate: Choose today or an earlier date.
milestones.plant_added.title: New home! 🏡
milestones.watered.title: Watering
milestones.watering_unknown.title: Watering date unknown
milestones.watering_unknown.description: The last watering date was not remembered.
milestones.soil_checked.title: Soil check
milestones.repotted.title: Fresh start 🌱
milestones.repotting_unknown.title: Repotting date unknown
milestones.repotting_unknown.description: The last repotting date was not remembered.
milestones.fertilized.title: Fertilizing
milestones.new_leaf.title: A new leaf! ✨
milestones.new_leaf.description: A fresh leaf has started to unfold.
milestones.bloomed.title: It bloomed! 🌸
milestones.pruned.title: Pruning
milestones.damaged.title: A little accident 🍃
milestones.damaged.description: One of the leaves was damaged.
milestones.recovered.title: Feeling better 💚
milestones.moved_home.title: A new spot 🪟
milestones.moved_home.description: Moved to a new place at home.
milestones.treatment_started.title: Care plan started 🧴
milestones.treatment_completed.title: Treatment finished 🌿
milestones.custom_note.title: A little note ✍️
rooms.saveFailed: I couldn’t add this room. Please try again.
rooms.deleteWithPlants: {room} has {count} plants. Move them before deleting the room.
careAction.checkSoilDue: Today it’s time to check the soil.
careAction.soilCheckGuidance: Check the top 3–4 cm of soil with your finger before deciding about water.
careAction.waterDue: The next useful step is watering.
careAction.photoDue: A fresh photo will help update the care plan.
careAction.observeWithReminder: Nothing urgent right now. The exact next check date is in the reminder.
careAction.observeNewGrowth: Nothing urgent right now. Keep watching the newest growth.
careAction.observeAfterMoistSoil: Nothing urgent right now. The soil was slightly damp, so watering is not needed yet.
careAction.observeAfterWetSoil: Do not water right now. Watch whether the soil dries and whether new stress appears.
careAction.observeAfterDrySoil: Nothing urgent right now. Watch how the plant responds as the soil dries.
careAction.soilAnswered: The soil check is saved. We’ll check again when it’s time.
careAction.observe: Nothing urgent right now. Keep observing for the next few days.
plantHealth.healthy: Everything looks good. No action is needed right now.
plantHealth.adapting: The plant is adjusting after recent changes. Small reactions are expected.
plantHealth.watch: There are minor signs worth calmly watching.
plantHealth.needsAttention: Check care soon: soil, light, or nearby conditions may need attention.
plantHealth.actionNeeded: This plant likely needs care now.
plants.afterWatering.message: All set for now. We’ll check in again soon.
plants.new.message: Settling in nicely. Add a few more photos when you can.
plants.checkSoon.message: This plant could use a quick check today.
plants.needsAttention.message: This plant may need a little extra care. Check its visible growth, light, and soil.
plants.martha.message: She’s absolutely thriving right now. Check back in 4 days.
plants.ollie.message: Ollie could use some water. Check whether the topsoil is dry.
plants.franklin.message: Franklin’s leaves look a little stressed. Moving him away from the window might help.
plants.luna.message: Luna is loving her spot by the window. She’s been looking happy lately.
plants.luna.checkMessage: Luna looks happy, but her soil could use a quick check today.
milestones.new.plant_added.description: Your new plant joined the family.
